articles.headline: Wembanyama returns from concussion and Spurs beat Blazers 114-93 to take 3-1 series lead
articles.description: — Victor Wembanyama had 27 points, 11 rebounds and seven blocks in his return from a concussion and the San Antonio Spurs took a 3-1 lead in their first-round series against the Portland Trail Blazers with a 114-93 victory on Sunday.

images.name: Wemby’s alley-oop slam gives Spurs’ lead
images.caption: Victor Wembanyama's alley-oop slam dunk gives the Spurs a fourth quarter lead.

articles.headline: Raptors win rock fight in Game 4 to even series with Cavaliers
articles.description: The Raptors outlasted the Cavaliers in Game 4 despite shooting the lowest 3-point shooting percentage (13.3%) in a playoff win in NBA history.

articles.headline: Who has played the most NBA playoff games without a title?
articles.description: Chris Paul, Patrick Ewing and John Stockton are among NBA greats who have played the most playoff games without winning a championship.

images.name: NBA Playoffs logo [600x400]
images.caption: Plenty of players have played more than 100 playoff games without winning a championship.
